title: vandenboschia fallax
intro: Vandenboschia fallax, also known as the dwarf spleenwort, is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in Asia, due to its medicinal properties which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Vandenboschia fallax include reducing stress, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and dried extracts, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
